objective: Validate end-of-task immediate rescan and 3-minute idle task search behavior. Worker must enforce unique worker_id matching and ignore tasks that do not target its ID unless admin password override is supplied.
admin_override_rule: Tasks with mismatched required_worker_id are ignored unless admin override is invoked with a valid ADMIN_OVERRIDE_PASSWORD matching local ADMIN_PASSWORD_SHA256.
required_validation: Autopilot claims TASK-0016 only when required_worker_id matches worker_id
After one completed task, autopilot immediately rescans for next task before sleeping
When idle, autopilot sleeps 180 seconds between git/task scans
Task with mismatched required_worker_id is ignored by default
Forced cross-worker execution is blocked without admin override password
Autopilot commits and pushes result to origin/main
execution_instructions: Run on Ubuntu worker via autopilot
Do not execute any script other than executor_script
Capture stdout and stderr excerpts in result JSON
Commit message format: worker: autopilot result TASK-0016
